caption:
East Village Christmas Lights Switch-On & Christmas Market ✨🎄

A magical evening filled with performances, a food & gifts market, a curling lane, a Christmas crafting cabin, and even a doggy parade 🐶! I also had a chance to visit @signorelli_london to try their delicious treats, including carrot cake and peanut butter cookies 🍪. One of the many cosy spots to enjoy in East Village ☕

East Village is a Get Living neighbourhood, where city-meets-village living. It offers a mix of stylish studios through to 4-bedroom homes and townhouses with built-in conveniences 🏡 Living here means being part of a community, located by the Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park and close to major transport hubs (only 7 minutes to St Pancras) 🚆

With independent cafés, restaurants, bars, and retailers, East Village is a fantastic place to live✨

📍 East Village, 1 East Park Walk, E20 1JL
@eastvillageldn
